testcase.name: test_admin_list_students

error.message:
failed on setup with "file C:\Users\52414\Documents\class\Quinto_Cuatrimestre\MathBoost\backend\tests\test_admin_students.py, line 7 @pytest.mark.asyncio async def test_admin_list_students(client: AsyncClient, seed_student, seed_teacher): """ Especificación SDD: GET /api/v1/admin/students - Escenario exitoso: un usuario admin obtiene la lista de estudiantes. - Seguridad: estudiantes o maestros reciben 403. """ # 1. Admin accede admin_headers = auth_headers("admin_user_1", role="admin") resp_admin = await client.get("/api/v1/admin/students", headers=admin_headers) assert resp_admin.status_code == 200, "Admin debe poder listar alumnos" data = resp_admin.json() assert isinstance(data, list)
# 2. RBAC: Estudiante no puede acceder student_headers = auth_headers(seed_student["_id"], role="estudiante") resp_student = await client.get("/api/v1/admin/students", headers=student_headers) assert resp_student.status_code == 403, "Estudiantes deben recibir 403 Forbidden"
# 3. RBAC: Maestro no puede acceder teacher_headers = auth_headers(seed_teacher["_id"], role="maestro") resp_teacher = await client.get("/api/v1/admin/students", headers=teacher_headers) assert resp_teacher.status_code == 403, "Maestros deben recibir 403 Forbidden" E fixture 'seed_student' not found > available fixtures: _class_scoped_runner, _function_scoped_runner, _module_scoped_runner, _package_scoped_runner, _session_scoped_runner, anyio_backend, anyio_backend_name, anyio_backend_options, cache, capfd, capfdbinary, caplog, capsys, capsysbinary, capteesys, client, doctest_namespace, event_loop, event_loop_policy, free_tcp_port, free_tcp_port_factory, free_udp_port, free_udp_port_factory, mock_db, monkeypatch, pytestconfig, record_property, record_testsuite_property, record_xml_attribute, recwarn, subtests, tmp_path, tmp_path_factory, tmpdir, tmpdir_factory, unused_tcp_port, unused_tcp_port_factory, unused_udp_port, unused_udp_port_factory > use 'pytest --fixtures [testpath]' for help on them.
C:\Users\52414\Documents\class\Quinto_Cuatrimestre\MathBoost\backend\tests\test_admin_students.py:7"

""" # 1. Admin accede admin_headers = auth_headers("admin_user_1", role="admin") resp_admin = await client.get("/api/v1/admin/students", headers=admin_headers) assert resp_admin.status_code == 200, "Admin debe poder listar alumnos" data = resp_admin.json() assert isinstance(data, list)
# 2. RBAC: Estudiante no puede acceder student_headers = auth_headers(seed_student["_id"], role="estudiante") resp_student = await client.get("/api/v1/admin/students", headers=student_headers) assert resp_student.status_code == 403, "Estudiantes deben recibir 403 Forbidden"
# 3. RBAC: Maestro no puede acceder teacher_headers = auth_headers(seed_teacher["_id"], role="maestro") resp_teacher = await client.get("/api/v1/admin/students", headers=teacher_headers) assert resp_teacher.status_code == 403, "Maestros deben recibir 403 Forbidden" E fixture 'seed_student' not found > available fixtures: _class_scoped_runner, _function_scoped_runner, _module_scoped_runner, _package_scoped_runner, _session_scoped_runner, anyio_backend, anyio_backend_name, anyio_backend_options, cache, capfd, capfdbinary, caplog, capsys, capsysbinary, capteesys, client, doctest_namespace, event_loop, event_loop_policy, free_tcp_port, free_tcp_port_factory, free_udp_port, free_udp_port_factory, mock_db, monkeypatch, pytestconfig, record_property, record_testsuite_property, record_xml_attribute, recwarn, subtests, tmp_path, tmp_path_factory, tmpdir, tmpdir_factory, unused_tcp_port, unused_tcp_port_factory, unused_udp_port, unused_udp_port_factory > use 'pytest --fixtures [testpath]' for help on them.

testcase.name: test_admin_create_student
test_admin_update_student

error.message:
failed on setup with "file C:\Users\52414\Documents\class\Quinto_Cuatrimestre\MathBoost\backend\tests\test_admin_students.py, line 51 @pytest.mark.asyncio async def test_admin_update_student(client: AsyncClient, seed_student): """ Especificación SDD: PUT /api/v1/admin/students/{student_id} Admin puede modificar el perfil de un alumno. """ admin_headers = auth_headers("admin_user_1", role="admin") student_id = seed_student["_id"]
payload = { "nombre": "Estudiante Actualizado por Admin", }
resp = await client.put(f"/api/v1/admin/students/{student_id}", json=payload, headers=admin_headers) assert resp.status_code == 200 data = resp.json() assert data["nombre"] == payload["nombre"] E fixture 'seed_student' not found > available fixtures: _class_scoped_runner, _function_scoped_runner, _module_scoped_runner, _package_scoped_runner, _session_scoped_runner, anyio_backend, anyio_backend_name, anyio_backend_options, cache, capfd, capfdbinary, caplog, capsys, capsysbinary, capteesys, client, doctest_namespace, event_loop, event_loop_policy, free_tcp_port, free_tcp_port_factory, free_udp_port, free_udp_port_factory, mock_db, monkeypatch, pytestconfig, record_property, record_testsuite_property, record_xml_attribute, recwarn, subtests, tmp_path, tmp_path_factory, tmpdir, tmpdir_factory, unused_tcp_port, unused_tcp_port_factory, unused_udp_port, unused_udp_port_factory > use 'pytest --fixtures [testpath]' for help on them.
C:\Users\52414\Documents\class\Quinto_Cuatrimestre\MathBoost\backend\tests\test_admin_students.py:51"

""" admin_headers = auth_headers("admin_user_1", role="admin") student_id = seed_student["_id"]
payload = { "nombre": "Estudiante Actualizado por Admin", }
resp = await client.put(f"/api/v1/admin/students/{student_id}", json=payload, headers=admin_headers) assert resp.status_code == 200 data = resp.json() assert data["nombre"] == payload["nombre"] E fixture 'seed_student' not found > available fixtures: _class_scoped_runner, _function_scoped_runner, _module_scoped_runner, _package_scoped_runner, _session_scoped_runner, anyio_backend, anyio_backend_name, anyio_backend_options, cache, capfd, capfdbinary, caplog, capsys, capsysbinary, capteesys, client, doctest_namespace, event_loop, event_loop_policy, free_tcp_port, free_tcp_port_factory, free_udp_port, free_udp_port_factory, mock_db, monkeypatch, pytestconfig, record_property, record_testsuite_property, record_xml_attribute, recwarn, subtests, tmp_path, tmp_path_factory, tmpdir, tmpdir_factory, unused_tcp_port, unused_tcp_port_factory, unused_udp_port, unused_udp_port_factory > use 'pytest --fixtures [testpath]' for help on them.

testcase.name: test_admin_delete_student

error.message:
failed on setup with "file C:\Users\52414\Documents\class\Quinto_Cuatrimestre\MathBoost\backend\tests\test_admin_students.py, line 70 @pytest.mark.asyncio async def test_admin_delete_student(client: AsyncClient, seed_student): """ Especificación SDD: DELETE /api/v1/admin/students/{student_id} Admin puede eliminar a un alumno. """ admin_headers = auth_headers("admin_user_1", role="admin") student_id = seed_student["_id"]
resp = await client.delete(f"/api/v1/admin/students/{student_id}", headers=admin_headers) assert resp.status_code == 200 assert resp.json()["message"] == "Estudiante eliminado exitosamente"
# Verificar que ya no existe (un GET no autorizado o directamente a la base de mock si fuera posible; # pero a nivel API confirmamos el 200)
# Si volvemos a intentar eliminar el mismo estudiante, debería ser 404 resp_retry = await client.delete(f"/api/v1/admin/students/{student_id}", headers=admin_headers) assert resp_retry.status_code == 404 E fixture 'seed_student' not found > available fixtures: _class_scoped_runner, _function_scoped_runner, _module_scoped_runner, _package_scoped_runner, _session_scoped_runner, anyio_backend, anyio_backend_name, anyio_backend_options, cache, capfd, capfdbinary, caplog, capsys, capsysbinary, capteesys, client, doctest_namespace, event_loop, event_loop_policy, free_tcp_port, free_tcp_port_factory, free_udp_port, free_udp_port_factory, mock_db, monkeypatch, pytestconfig, record_property, record_testsuite_property, record_xml_attribute, recwarn, subtests, tmp_path, tmp_path_factory, tmpdir, tmpdir_factory, unused_tcp_port, unused_tcp_port_factory, unused_udp_port, unused_udp_port_factory > use 'pytest --fixtures [testpath]' for help on them.
C:\Users\52414\Documents\class\Quinto_Cuatrimestre\MathBoost\backend\tests\test_admin_students.py:70"

""" admin_headers = auth_headers("admin_user_1", role="admin") student_id = seed_student["_id"]
resp = await client.delete(f"/api/v1/admin/students/{student_id}", headers=admin_headers) assert resp.status_code == 200 assert resp.json()["message"] == "Estudiante eliminado exitosamente"
# Verificar que ya no existe (un GET no autorizado o directamente a la base de mock si fuera posible; # pero a nivel API confirmamos el 200)
